about.desc: FLOVAS, s.r.o. is a recruitment agency specializing in employment across the entire territory of the Czech Republic. We offer jobs in various industries — manufacturing, logistics, construction, warehouse operations, and other sectors.
about.our_advantages6: Support in obtaining a visa and other documents
about.our_advantages7: We pay social and medical insurance
about.our_advantages10: We organize transportation from home to work
about.our_advantages11: We are there for you in case of problems
about.our_advantages12: We will help you overcome the language barrier
about.our_advantages13: We will help you with your move
about.goal_desc: To provide every client with stable employment, comfortable living conditions, and full legal support for a confident start in the Czech Republic.
about.employment_place_title: We provide employment throughout the Czech Republic

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy (GDPR)
privacyPolicy.txt1: These policies explain how we collect, use and protect your personal data in the context of employment mediation and personnel administration.
privacyPolicy.txt2: Who is the controller of your data?
privacyPolicy.txt3: The controller of personal data is FLOVAS s.r.o. We are responsible for ensuring that your data is processed lawfully, transparently and securely in accordance with EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR).
privacyPolicy.txt5: For the purposes of finding a suitable job position and entering into an employment relationship, we process in particular:
privacyPolicy.txt6: Identification data: first name, surname, date of birth, nationality.
privacyPolicy.txt7: Contact data: phone number, email, residential address.
privacyPolicy.txt8: Professional data: CV, information about education, previous work experience and skills.
privacyPolicy.txt9: Documents: copies of visas, residence permits, passport data (necessary for lawful employee registration).
privacyPolicy.txt10: Purpose and legal basis of processing
privacyPolicy.txt11: We process your data on the basis of the following legal grounds:
privacyPolicy.txt12: Performance of a contract or measures taken prior to entering into a contract: in order to mediate work and conclude a contract.
privacyPolicy.txt13: Compliance with a legal obligation: reporting to authorities (Labour Office, CSSZ, health insurance companies) and tax administration.
privacyPolicy.txt14: Consent: for retention in the applicant database for future job offers.
privacyPolicy.txt15: Legitimate interest: to protect our rights in the event of legal disputes.
privacyPolicy.txt16: To whom do we transfer your data?
privacyPolicy.txt17: Your data may be provided to:
privacyPolicy.txt18: Employers (clients): potential companies you are applying to.
privacyPolicy.txt19: State authorities: Labour Office of the Czech Republic, Customs Administration, health insurance companies and social security administration.
privacyPolicy.txt20: Processors: external accounting and payroll companies or IT service providers.
privacyPolicy.txt22: For the duration of the selection process for a specific position.
privacyPolicy.txt23: For the duration of the employment relationship and subsequently for 10 years (in accordance with archiving periods set by Czech law).
privacyPolicy.txt24: 3 years based on your consent (for the purposes of future offers), unless you withdraw your consent earlier.
privacyPolicy.txt27: Request access to your personal data.
privacyPolicy.txt28: Rectification of incomplete or incorrect data.
privacyPolicy.txt29: Erasure of data ("right to be forgotten").
privacyPolicy.txt30: Withdraw your consent to processing at any time.
privacyPolicy.txt31: Lodge a complaint with the Office for Personal Data Protection (UOOU).
privacyPolicy.txt32: If you have any questions regarding GDPR, you can contact us:
